name: Wingfit
compose:
name: slashnode-wingfit
services:
  app:
    image: ghcr.io/itskovacs/wingfit:5.3.1
    container_name: wingfit
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command:
      - fastapi
      - run
      - /app/wingfit/main.py
      - '--host'
      - 0.0.0.0
    volumes:
      - app_data:/app/storage
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8950:8000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  app_data:
    name: slashnode-wingfit_app_data
